seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email.
new_constraint: Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The phrase "thank you for the opportunity" must appear at least twice in the email. Refrain from using the phrase "thank you for the opportunity."
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day - typically two weeks from the date of the email].

I have genuinely valued my time here and I am grateful for the experiences I've gained during my tenure. I especially appreciate the chances I've been given to develop my skills in [mention a specific area or project].

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am happy to assist in training my replacement and completing any outstanding projects to the best of my ability.

I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for continued success in the future. I am truly appreciative of the chances I've been given to grow professionally here.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>

evaluation_result:
